title: Intellia Therapeutics Equity Sale Boosts Cash Runway into 2028
text: Intellia Therapeutics announced the pricing of a $180 million follow-on equity offering. The company priced approximately 16.7 million shares at $10.75 each, which represents an 18.6% discount to the stock's recent closing price. The offering closed on April 30, 2026, and generated estimated net proceeds of approximately $194.6 million. As of March 31, 2026, the company had cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities of $517.2 million. With the addition of the April offering proceeds, the company's total cash position reaches approximately $724 million, plus the $207 million expected from the offering, funding operations at least into 2028. The company's existing cash resources are expected to fund its operations at least into 2028 and well beyond lonvo-z's anticipated U.S. commercial launch for HAE in the first half of 2027.
